fields.name: Message for Accepting User
fields.tooltip: Specifies a message for the user that accepts the license agreement.

fields.name: Effective Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date on which the license agreement was accepted.

fields.name: Effective Date Changed By
fields.tooltip: Specifies the person who changed the effective date for the license.

fields.name: Effective Date Changed On
fields.tooltip: Specifies the effective date that the license was changed.

fields.name: Accepted
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the license agreement was accepted.

fields.name: Accepted By
fields.tooltip: Specifies the person that accepted the license agreement.

fields.name: Accepted On
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date the license agreement is accepted.
